source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for English product UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese headings, body, labels, and numeric rhythm.
layout: Bold 8px campaign grids, petal-sweep sections, seed-dot status marks, grassline dividers, and high-contrast editorial rhythm.

prompts.label: Transparent poppy motif source
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a red poppy bloom with stem, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A grassland red poppy bloom with vivid poppy red petals, black seed center, slender natural green stem, subtle wheat tan warmth only in natural petal shadows, and accurate botanical structure.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop petals, seed center, or stem. One bloom only, full flower head and visible stem.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves thin petal detail, opaque saturated red petal body, black seed center contrast, and stem detail.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00FFFF cyan chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use cyan, teal, turquoise, or blue-green anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no vase, no bouquet, no grassland scene, no decorative background, no second subject, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive LIGHT MODE design-system board for a Morphous theme named exactly "Morphous Poppy", derived from the visible transparent red poppy bloom cutout.
Canvas and framing: STRICT wide landscape 16:9 board, like a 3840 x 2160 presentation slide. Do not make a portrait or square board. Fill a single horizontal canvas with a precise product-design grid.
Reference use: Use the visible poppy cutout as the source of truth. Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from saturated poppy red petals, black seed center, olive green stem, wheat tan field warmth, dry grass muted tones, and root umber shadows.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution source board with large readable labels; avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Poppy", subtitle "Red Poppy Bloom", Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese product UI examples; labels like Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Numeric.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line/bar charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style bold campaign system, realistic UI mockup, precise grid, 8px card radius, petal-sweep panels, seed-dot accents, field-informed hierarchy, crisp product interface details.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the motif: poppy red, petal coral, seed black, stem green, wheat tan, pale field, dry grass, root umber.
Text: short readable UI labels only; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Poppy", no tiny illegible token tables.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a DARK MODE version of the visible Morphous Poppy design-system board. It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Canvas and framing: STRICT wide landscape 16:9 board, like a 3840 x 2160 presentation slide. Do not make a portrait or square board. Fill a single horizontal canvas with a precise product-design grid.
Reference use: Use the visible transparent red poppy cutout and visible light-mode Morphous Poppy board as references. Preserve palette roles, component language, petal-sweep texture, seed-dot accents, spacing, Japanese typography, shadcn/tweakcn component coverage, dashboard layout, forms, table, command/search, and generated asset examples.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution source board with large readable labels; avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Poppy", subtitle "Red Poppy Bloom", visible label "Dark Mode", Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Visual details: dark background derived from seed black and root umber, light text from wheat light, primary accents from poppy red, secondary accents from petal coral and stem green, wheat tan chart details, dry grass muted borders, subtle red petal overlays, black seed-dot texture, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls.
Typography: include English and Japanese product UI examples; labels like Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Numeric.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line/bar charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Text: short readable UI labels only; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no purple/blue gradients, no flat pure-black-only background, no illegible text, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Poppy", no tiny illegible token tables.
